entry.title: Re: Data migration from SAP B1 to S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Thank you very much Sybille for the detailed explanation! You have already confirmed couple of my assumptions. I would like to know whether we can automate the process of "Next step would be to get the data out of B1, map this data to S4, and then populate the templates" atleast populating of templates, as filling the templates manually does not seem practical.

entry.title: Re: How to get the details of the Tools accessing HANA Mo...
entry.content:
I think that the best option is Audit Policies: Best Practices and Recommendations for Creating Audit Policies | SAP Help Portal

There are system tables and views with some statistics but always are just the latest. 

Regards,

entry.title: Creating address of any existing bp using API in SAP Hana Public cloud& cl_http_destination_provider
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have developed an app using RAP. When I try to create Address using 'A_BusinessPartnerAddress' of Business Partner ( A2X ) of an existing BP that does not have an address, it is giving me the following message:

Error Message "Internal error when calling operation module BUA_CHECK_ADDRESS_VALIDITY_ALL; a check table is missing" 

code: R11/243

I have gone through the KBA 3109298 and it is the same problem. follow the url for more details.

url:  https://me.sap.com/notes/3109298/E

But here they only explain it for POST request payload.

I am using class cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement for creating the destination and Service Consumption Model to create the address there is no way to add any association to use Address Usage  that I can find.

 

My Code : 

METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
DATA:
ls_business_data TYPE zpatient_reg_scom=>tys_a_business_partner_addre_2,
lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_web_http_client,
lo_client_proxy TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_client_proxy,
lo_request TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_create,
lo_response TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_response_create.

TRY.
DATA(v_guid) = cl_system_uuid=>if_system_uuid_static~create_uuid_c32( ).
CATCH cx_uuid_error INTO DATA(r_uuid_exc).
ENDTRY.
TRY.
" Create http client
TRY.
DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
comm_scenario = 'ZTEST' ).
CATCH cx_http_dest_provider_error.
"handle exception
ENDTRY.

lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).
lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(
EXPORTING
is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'
proxy_model_id = 'ZPATIENT_REG_SCOM'
proxy_model_version = '0001' )
io_http_client = lo_http_client
iv_relative_service_root = '' ).

ASSERT lo_http_client IS BOUND.

* Prepare business data
ls_business_data = VALUE #(
business_partner = '14013'
validity_start_date = 20240916123000
validity_end_date = 99990101123000
address_uuid = v_guid
city_name = 'Berhampore'
country = 'IN'
language = 'EN'
pobox = '733121'
pobox_postal_code = '733121'
postal_code = '733121'
region = 'WB'
street_name = 'TEST'
).

" Navigate to the resource and create a request for the create operation
lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'A_BUSINESS_PARTNER_ADDRESS' )->create_request_for_create( ).
" Set the business data for the created entity
lo_request->set_business_data( ls_business_data ).
" Execute the request
lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).
" Get the after image
*lo_response->get_business_data( IMPORTING es_business_data = ls_business_data ).
CATCH /iwbep/cx_cp_remote INTO DATA(lx_remote).  I am getting error here... Please note if I try to create the BP address manually then If i create it from code its working fine. Default address Usage issue I know but My question is how to solve the issue using KBA 3109298 for my scenario
" Handle remote Exception
" It contains details about the problems of your http(s) connection


CATCH /iwbep/cx_gateway INTO DATA(lx_gateway).
" Handle Exception

CATCH cx_web_http_client_error INTO DATA(lx_web_http_client_error).
" Handle Exception
RAISE SHORTDUMP lx_web_http_client_error.

ENDTRY.
ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: Re: for IT edocument, we have RE with debit and credit me...
entry.content:
Hi 

1. Define Value Mapping in AIF:
Go to the AIF transaction `/AIF/VMAP`.
Select `GET_DOC_TYPE_EXT` for the mapping configuration.

2. Create Separate Mappings for Debit and Credit:
Create two entries in the value mapping table:
For Debit Entries:
Source: `REE4`
Target: `TD01`
For Credit Entries:
Source: `REE4`
Target: `TD04`

3. Use Additional Fields for Differentiation:
Since both MIRO types have the same document type (RE) and tax code (E4), consider using additional fields in the payload to differentiate between debit and credit. This could be a specific field that indicates the type of transaction (e.g., a flag or indicator).

4. Modify Mapping Logic:
Ensure that the mapping logic in AIF checks the additional field. If the field indicates a credit transaction, it should map to `TD04`, while a debit transaction should map to `TD01`.

5. Test the Mapping:
Perform tests to ensure that the correct document types are assigned based on the values passed in the interface. Check the logs in AIF for any errors or issues during the mapping.

By following these steps, you should be able to successfully configure value mapping for your MIRO transactions, distinguishing between debit and credit memo scenarios.

entry.title: Re: DTPs are not visible in BW/4HANA's standard DataFlow...
entry.content:
Hi Umasaral
Thanks for your reply. I already tried all the options except the option(7) but none of them resolved the issue.
Thanks
ISKhan

entry.title: Re: crystal reports convert number to time value
entry.content:
Hi, You can also use this formula to convert the time to a 24-hour format. Please replace the table name and field name with the appropriate values for your specific data.

Left(Replace(ToText({ORCT.DocTime}, 0), ",", ""), Length(ToText({ORCT.DocTime}, 0)) - 3) +':' + Right(ToText({ORCT.DocTime},0),2)

Original Value 14,33.00

Converted value 14:33

 

Thank you

Siwantha Matarage

entry.title: Re: Diference between Standard DSO and Direct Update DSO...
entry.content:
Hello,

The post is very old, but I hope it can help others in the future: I have redesigned the model by switching to a Direct Update DSO, and it works perfectly.

Technically, it’s not wrong to use a Standard DSO with planning-enabled functionality. However, it’s not optimal in terms of performance. The activation and change log processes can lead to performance issues, particularly in scenarios with high-frequency data updates, like planning.

Best regards.

Duyen

entry.title: Re: NSQ Meetup on Thu, Sept 26 - Who is in / Where to meet?

entry.title: Re: Concur: Travel expenses are not displayed in the Professional Service
entry.content:
Hello @SaintC ,

did you check that the accounts that Concur is posting the expenses with are maintained in the SSCUI "Define Expenses" (101306)? If you are missing the expenses in the billing of a time and expense contract type please also make sure that the billing profile as well as the cost element groups are maintained properly.

Best regards,

David

entry.title: Read and write files from SFTP to BTP UI5 application
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where I need to develop a UI5 application on BTP using BAS and need to read and write files from the SFTP server. We have an integration suite, we can use that as well.

Please suggest me an approach and documentation to fulfill this requirement.


Jitendra Singh,

entry.title: China Golden Tax - FDEI Excel solution
entry.content:
We have Activated Business Functions and trying to use the FDEI solution within SAP. We use the Excel templates which is created in this process.

In here we also have some Badi's that we use to make sure to retrieve the correct data in the columns in the excel template delivered standard by SAP.

IDGTCN_OB_ADJUST_CONFIG

IDGTCN_OB_DATASET_PREP_AFT

IDGTCN_OB_OPR_DET_VALUE4TMPL

All this is working fine. However when we have the output (in English), we then replace English header with Chinese header, but it cannot be uploaded. And we receive message : “导入失败，导入模板已更新，请下载最新模板填写后重新上传”, English is “Import failed, import template has been updated, please download the latest template, fill it out and re-upload it” - The issue is that the template we get out of SAP is the same as the one we may download. Anyone in here using these excel templates and having the same issue ???

The in the inbound process - App: Upload Inbound Files - we do this manually and this works fine. However we want to update some additional fields that is not included in the inbound file from Government, but which we will take from the tabels  EIV_GTD_HDR – in here we have field DISC_AMOUNT and DISC_TAX_AMOUNT, which we would like to update in TXI_HDR field DISC_NET_AMOUNT and DISC_TAX_AMOUNT. However we can not find any Badi to use. Anyone in here have suggestions ?

I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification. 

Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt
Dap

entry.title: Field-symbol gets unassigned unexpectedly.
entry.content:
Hi, has anyone experienced that the field-symbol gets unassigned unexpectedly?

Here's my code

ASSIGN IT_TABLE [ ... ] TO FIELD SYMBOL <FS_TEST>.

IF <FS_TEST> IS ASSIGNED.

ENDIF.

DATA(V_VAR1) = <FS_TEST>-EBELN.   <-------------- I'm encountering an error here. Because the <FS_TEST gets unassigned even though there was no UNASSIGN logic inside the IF ENDIF condition.

How do I resolve that?

entry.title: Creation of custom field in master data using Custom Field Fiori application in S/4 HANA UPA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

This post will explain to create custom field in master data in new S/4 HANA UPA system with the help of "Custom Field" Fiori application. As SAP is thriving towards No code Low code, in S/4 HANA the app called "Custom Field" is provided which can help Functional as well Technical consultant to create custom field in master data with few steps to store data as per Business requirement.

There are many scenarios in which requirement come from Business to store certain data in master data object and use the same in reports. With the help of Custom Field and Logic Fiori application we can have custom fields available in correct business context along with it also create CDS view in backend which help to have particular custom field in certain standard report and tables

Let's start and see how we can create custom field in master data using Fiori application with new S/4 HANA UPA (Universal Parallel Accounting) 2023 system. In our case we will create custom field to store certain data in Purchase Order item level. Which means at the time of PO creation user can use custom field to store data at Purchase order item level

Creating custom field as master data in Purchase order to record data and have custom field available in most of the reports with CDS view.

 

Step1: Login to Fiori app: Custom Fields and Logic (F1481)

 

 

 

Custom Fields and Logic fiori app is deprecated in S/4 HANA 2023 UPA system. Now login to above Fiori app “Custom Fields” but Fiori app ID remain the same i.e. F1481.

 

Step2: Click on “Create option” by pressing “+” sign on the right-hand side of the app as indicated below

 

 

 

Step3: Selection of right business context

Business context is to be selected which indicate where the custom field have to be created.

In our example we want to create custom field in Purchase Order line item level, hence we will select the right Business context which allow us to create custom field in Purchase order line item

 

 

Step4: Provide “Label”

Label indicate name of the custom field we are creating. Same naming convention will be appended in standard table for Purchase order line item i.e. EKPO with prefix “ZZ” which indicate that it is custom field.

 

 

 

 

Step5: Select the “Type” and length according to requirement

 

Type indicate whether it is Date, Character or only number etc.

Here our requirement is to have our custom field as Character which is nothing but Numerical text in the language of custom field logic app

 

 

Also we will select Length as “20” for our custom field

 

 

Now we will create the field using option “Create”

 

 

Step6: enable the interface created as Odata services and CDS view required as per business requirement.

 

 

 

Step7: Enable CDS view required for Analytics, API, etc

 

 

 

 

Step8: Save the details and click on "Publish" to have the same

 

 

Publish

 

 

It will take few minutes depends upon number of CDS view, Odata service got activated for mentioned custom field.

After it publish, custom field is available in mentioned Business context and ready for use

 

 

Custom field can be viewed as a part of standard table starting with "ZZ1"

 

This is how we can create our own custom field with few simple steps

Let me know if you have any question or provide feedback if any

I thank to Satish Vallabhneni to guide me writing this blog.

Thanks

Raunak Bhatia

entry.title: Re: How to get the details of the Tools accessing HANA Mo...

It seems only standard policies are only active our system which has the Policy names starts with: audit_***** & no custom polices are created. & none of them has value 'SELECT' on EVENT_ACTION . So just wanted to know apart from Audit policies no where else the Stats are captured right ?

entry.title: Re: Email to be sent to email ID if document is released...
entry.content:
Hi,

you could try to use this BAdi for creating email when releasing blocked documents:
BAdi: Release Blocked Documents

Definition: /SAPSLL/CUHD_RELEASE
Interface: /SAPSLL/IF_EX_CUHD_RELEASE
Method: R3_DOCUMENT_RELEASE

BR
Fabian

upload the pdf from Adobe Form to BDS. similar to the the previous way where it was working.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Company Database not Displaying on the SLD
entry.content: It seems like the sql service is not started

entry.title: Re: Both inventory transfer and a goods issue in the same...
entry.content:
Hello @B30 

I don't think it's possible to merge a transfer posting and a goods issue into a single material document. You will have to post to separate material documents with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE and commit each of them separately - see the note 3005044 - Error M7299 during material document posting

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Update OITM
entry.content:
Hello

I used UPDATE query in query generator for sap business one to change items (oitm) validFor and frozenFor fields. Update query worked good but then I couldn't add item for oitm (items). How to fix it? 

 

I have written 
UPDATE OITM T0

SET T0."ValidFor" = 'Y', T0."frozenFor" = 'N'

entry.title: How to use distribution (FAGLGA35) to distribute from one account to another？
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using the FI-GL % distribution (FAGLGA35) to distribute from one GL account, a profit centers (PC 1) to another account, a subset of Profit centers (PC 2, 3, 4). How to do that? 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Field-symbol gets unassigned unexpectedly.
entry.content:
Hello @walkerist 

Field symbols don't get unassigned automagically but themselves. Your code is as follows (make sure to format the code properly in your question):

ASSIGN IT_TABLE [ ... ] TO FIELD SYMBOL <FS_TEST>.
IF <FS_TEST> IS ASSIGNED.
ENDIF.
DATA(V_VAR1) = <FS_TEST>-EBELN.

If the assignment in the 1st line fails, then IF...ENDIF is not executed, but line 4 is. Thus, the line 4 is executed even if the field symbol is not assigned. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Was SAP UI Test Automation just killed by SAP API Hub and Solace?
entry.content:
@DominikTylczyn  thank you for the comment but the point I'm trying to make is slightly different. Imagine you're on a sinking ship (SAP UI test automation) that's taking on water and will inevitably go down. Someone offers a life raft (SAP API Test Automation), which, as you rightly pointed out, may not be the most comfortable or might not guarantee a perfect journey, but it's your best chance of survival and far greater that staying on a sinking ship. I believe that pointing out that the life raft isn't flawless misses the point, the UI Test Automation ship is definitely sinking. We need to get off it, and while the life raft isn't perfect, it's a far better option than staying on the ship that's going down 🙂 

Another question: how many times have you seen a decent amount of SAP TM test automation on any project? Is that what you'd expect or would you be willing to try something else? 

BR,

Michal Krawczyk

entry.title: Re: How to get the details of the Tools accessing HANA Mo...
entry.content: not that I know of. In our case this is usually handled more by the BASIS department,

entry.title: Re: Delegation visibility in New Learning experience
entry.content:
Hi @RAJA83 , 

I joined the webinar 'ILX Success: Rollout Strategies to Ensure a Successful Learning Launch'. This will become part of the new ILX with the upcoming 2H2024 Update - for production mid November. You will then find an option to 'Act as' in the in the menu on the right hand side, where ou can also switch to "Team View" and "MyClasses".

Cheers
Marc

entry.title: Re: Both inventory transfer and a goods issue in the same...
entry.content: Good morning Dominik, Thank you for answering. Whishful thinking on my part I suppose, I hoped there was a way to create a draft and have SAP understand what item needs to be transferred and which one needs to be issued.

entry.title: Re: What is SAP SuccessFactors and what do their consultants do?
entry.content:
Hello Mario,

( @MarioIbra ) 

Nice to meet you, and thank you for sharing your career aspirations. Apologies for the delayed answer.  

Your experience as a Recruiting Analyst is a great foundation for building your next career step as an SAP SuccessFactors consultant.

You should know that SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting contains technically three complementary solutions: Recruiting Management, Recruiting Marketing, and Recruiting Posting. Therefore, SAP offers two certifications for this module:

SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting: Recruiter Experience 

SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting: Candidate Experience

In addition, I would personally suggest you also get certified for the SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding module. By doing so, you could cover all the important workflows connected with a recruiting process.

SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding

I hope these links are helpful to you. To gain valuable hands-on experience and bridge the gap between theory and practice, I recommend exploring internship opportunities at both SAP and our official partners. This will provide you with diverse perspectives and practical insights into the world of SAP.

I wish you all the best on your learning journey!

Warm regards,

Victor

entry.title: Method for Distributing Logon Load Quality
entry.content:
When checking load distribution using T-CODE: SMLG, the quality of the central instance is lower compared to the other four instances.


I have applied the methods described in the following Note to improve the quality, but there has been no improvement.
Note 26317: https://me.sap.com/notes/0000026317

Is there a way to improve the quality of the central instance?

Register Here: https://events.sap.com/eur/eur-risewithsapenr/en/home

entry.title: Re: Created By-ERNAM field issue MDG-M
entry.content:
Hello Nedim,

please check SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3371448 and implement all referenced SAP Notes which may be relevant to you. In particular, I believe implementing the SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3490520  should help solve the problem you've been experiencing.

Regards, Elke

Re: An Introduction to Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere

Do you know how to resolve this ?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: How to Enable SolMan Incident Approval Directly from...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

For ChaRM documents Request for change there is an approval process. In both cases ITSM incident or ChaRM document, this is consulting and the way to achieve this is following what it is indicated in the SPRO point "Make Workflow Settings for Request for Change Approval".

The following link should also be useful:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/charm-approval-settings-email-functionality-in-change-request/qaq-p/9609612

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: SMQ2 - Display LUW doesn't open the Display Logs
entry.content:
Hi @S_Sriram,

it doesn't look like an authorization problem. The thing is that we cannot open the protocol (SLG1) from the SMQ2 with the double click on the error like normal. And the message is in the SLG1 (we tested it).
It looks like the association in between the SMQ2 and the protocol in the SLG1 has broke.

KR Isa

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

Thank you for this wonderful opportunity.

I identify as a person fitted to the criteria as I am neurodivergent, first generation of college graduate in my family, and also just spent only less than a year in implementing SAP. I need this opportunity to get a certificate in order to kickstart my career and have a firm stand in the market. Working as a neurodivergent means I have to work harder but achieve less than everyone else, so having a certificate will get me the recognition I need. 

I love working for SAP because of the ever-changing and developing nature of it, creating more chances to learn and grow each day.

I'm grateful for this opportunity and thank you for your consideration.

Best Regards,

Anh Cuong.

Christian

entry.title: Ensure smooth and efficient integration of SAP Analytics Cloud by keeping your SAP BW System up2date
entry.content:
As the patching process of an on-premises system fully relies on the customer's responsibility, SAP Analytics Cloud customers get their updates automatically, multiple times a year via Quarterly Release Cycle (QRC).  

There is an interplay between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP BW, which means that some of the new feature enhancements require updates on the SAP BW system as well. 

This blog gives you guidance on how to deal best with patching your SAP BW system when using SAP Analytics Cloud. Let's break it down. 

Prerequisites - Minimum Supported SAP BW version 

The minimum supported SAP BW version (as of September 2024) is SAP BW 7.50.  

In case your system is below that version, we strongly recommend upgrading your BW system to at least SAP BW 7.50 or BW/4HANA (to the highest SP available) as soon as possible to ensure smooth integration and take full advantage of SAP Analytics Cloud features.

SAP Notes and SAP BW Note Analyzer 

The smallest element in the patching process is an SAP Note. SAP Notes are essential tools for various tasks: 

  • Code Corrections: Fix minor issues in the system 
  • Enhancements: Enable new features, such as those in SAP Analytics Cloud 
  • Documentation: Provide information and guidelines 

SAP notes can be bundled and consumed via SAP Note Analyzer. You can find more information on how to use it here or within the user guide. 

Question: When do I need to run the SAP Note Analyzer? 

Answer: Before each SAP Analytics Cloud QRC update 

The latest .xml file has been thoroughly tested with SAP Analytics Cloud QRC updates to address bugs proactively and it includes fixes for all known issues. To stay informed about new .xml versions, you can subscribe to SAP Note 2541557. This way, you'll get notified whenever an updated version is available. 

Once the updated .xml file is available, you can apply it to your SAP BW system immediately. Make sure to do this no later than the next QRC of SAP Analytics Cloud. You can find more information in the harmonized release calendar for SAP Cloud products, SAP note 2888562. 

If several SNOTE corrections are required (a SAP Analytics Cloud feature can require multiple SAP BW Notes) and are available in the latest Support Package (SP), consider upgrading to the latest SP.  

We recommend planning a SP upgrade once a year. This helps to keep the number of notes needed for each QRC release manageable. For example, the difference between QRC2 2024 and QRC3 2024 is roughly 11 notes, which need to be applied quarterly anyways. 

Please check also the following SAP Notes: 

2541557, 375631, 2715030  

or the official help page for more information.

entry.title: Re: Percentage by dimensions on chart SAP WEBI
entry.content:
use the [Dimension 1] as a break in the percentage you use.

Percentage(measure[;Break][;Row|Col]

for Examples, see help for "Percentage"

entry.title: Re: New Digital Skills Initiative Applicant
entry.content:

It looks like you have successfully joined! Welcome aboard from a fellow veteran!

I've sent you an invitation via PM. 
Check out a few of my blogs for inspiration on where to get started:
How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?

How to figure out if your certification / learning content is free of charge

entry.title: Re: Vendor consignment stock consumption for outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi Vivek,

The supplier consignment stock is treated as part of unrestricted stock and hence if you have a deficit, it indicates that you in general do not have enough quantity available. Please check the app Monitor Product Availability' with Scope of Check 'B' (Delivery). You should then see other demand that may already consume the quantity.

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi, @David_Chaviano 

I fall in the following categories.

  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life
  • People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves

I would request you to please provide me the certification attempt it will boost my career growth.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori - App Variant title translation
entry.content: Hi, we use S4 onPrem. How should we use SE63 to translate the Variant Titles?

entry.title: Re: Guided Sourcing Auctions
entry.content: Hi Angeline, thanks for the above blog. We tried testing Guided Sourcing reverse auctions and found them to be inconvenient compared to Classical Rev. Auctions. We are in touch with our account's CSM to discuss this further.

entry.title: Re: DTPs are not visible in BW/4HANA's standard DataFlow...
entry.content:
Hi 

If you’ve already tried the previous options and the DTPs are still not visible in the Data Flow `/IMO/DF_FIAA_01`, here are a few additional steps you can consider:

1. Recheck DTP Assignment:
Open the DTP configuration directly and verify if it is assigned correctly to the right Data Source and InfoProvider. Ensure that it is part of the data flow in question.

2. Look for Hidden Elements:
In the BW Modeler, ensure that you haven’t inadvertently hidden the DTPs or their parent objects in the graphical view. Sometimes, elements can be collapsed or hidden.

3. Validate the Data Flow:
Use the validation tool in the BW Modeler to check for any inconsistencies or issues within the data flow that could prevent DTPs from being displayed.

4. Check for Transport Issues:
If the data flow was recently transported from another environment, ensure that all objects (including DTPs) were correctly transported. Missing objects can lead to display issues.

5. Explore Alternate Views:
Sometimes, viewing the data flow in different modes (like graphical vs. hierarchical) can reveal hidden DTPs or provide a different perspective on the configuration.

6. Clear Cache:
Clear any application cache or metadata cache that might be affecting visibility. You can do this via transaction codes like `/SAPAPO/RSV1` or similar for BW.

7. Review Documentation:
Check the official SAP documentation for any known issues or additional configuration steps specific to your version of BW/4HANA.

8. SAP Notes:
Look for relevant SAP Notes or KBA (Knowledge Base Articles) that might address similar issues or bugs related to DTP visibility in your specific BW version.

If these additional steps do not resolve the issue, contacting SAP Support with detailed information about the issue, including screenshots and any relevant logs, would be the next best action. They can provide more specialized assistance tailored to your situation.

entry.title: Re: Problems with AppState in FIORI-App on Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi

1. Check if Your App is Set Up for FLP-To ensure your app runs within the FLP:

Deployment: Make sure your app is deployed to the FLP environment and not running as a standalone application. This typically means it should be part of the Fiori launchpad's tiles or catalog.

Manifest Configuration: Check your `manifest.json` for the following:
sap.ui5 section should have the `crossNavigation` property set up to indicate the app can be navigated from the FLP.
SAP Fiori Launchpad Configuration: Ensure the app is configured correctly in the FLP's configuration settings.

Launchpad URL: Ensure that when you're accessing your app, you're using the FLP URL (like `https://<your-flp-host>/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/<your_app>`) rather than a direct URL to the app.

2. Check App State Management Setup
To verify if app state management is correctly set up:

Router Configuration: In your `manifest.json`, ensure that the `sap.ui.generic.app` section is correctly configured. Look for:
`routing`: Check that routes and targets are defined properly.
`navigation`: Ensure that the `target` configurations are properly set up for navigating between views.

App State Handling:
In your controller (e.g., the List Report), ensure you are using the `storeInnerAppStateAsync` function where appropriate. This might look like this:
```javascript
onInit: function() {
// Store app state on initialization or relevant event
this.getOwnerComponent().getRouter().getRoute("yourRoute").attachPatternMatched(this.onRouteMatched, this);
},

onRouteMatched: function(oEvent) {
// Logic to store app state
let oAppState = {/* Your app state logic */};
this.getOwnerComponent().getAppStateManager().storeInnerAppStateAsync(oAppState);
}
```
State Retrieval: Make sure you have implemented the logic to retrieve and apply the stored state when the app initializes or the route changes.

Additional Tips:
Browser Console: Use the browser's console to check for any other errors or warnings that might give hints on why the function isn’t recognized.

Documentation: Consult the [SAP Fiori Elements documentation](https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/9e2581ccbe6a4ef4a1a7a308cd06f6b7) for examples on implementing app state management effectively.

entry.title: Re: Converting Excel file data with multiple sheets to an internal table

entry.title: Re: error message at ME21n using user-exit EXIT_SAPMM06E_012
entry.content:
In CHECK method you receive IM_HEADER parameter, with this parameter

  • you can get header condition with GET_CONDITIONS
  • You can get an item list with GET_ITEMS, and for each returned item you can get conditions with GET_CONDITIONS

entry.title: Recipe Development In SAP PLM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need some information regarding the recipe development in SAP S4, if some one can help I really appreciate. 

1. When recipe is under development, in which table this data get store.

2. From where material numbers are get picked when we assign materials to specifications.

3. After synchronizing the recipe to BOM in which table this data gets updated.

4. Which tables recipe development uses for BOM, production version and recipe.

5. Are below tables getting used while recipe development - Eg  STPO, PLPO PLKO, MKAL, CRHD.

Thanks in advance, really appreciate the help.

in the head level if you have multiple Ship to Party  might not appear in head level, but you still have it available in Item Tab.

Rogerio

entry.title: Doubts in pricing Secure Login Service for SAPGUI
entry.content:
Hi community,

We are exploring the Secure Login Service for SAPGUI product, we have a case with 600 hundred users.

In the discovery center i can see this pricing :

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/sap-secure-login-service/?tab=service_plan&service_plan=default&region=all&commercialModel=subscription

Metric --> Users (In Blocks of 500)

Ranges --> Up to 6 

Unit price per month --> EUR 450,00

Does it means that we will have a cost of 900€/month? because we'll need 2 blocks.

Thanks,

Best regards,

Carlos.

Thanks,

Florian

entry.title: Re: Error updating ADT in Eclipse 2023-09
entry.content:
Which link was used in the eclipse and with which version? I suggest using the latest eclipse version with the latest link.

  • For Eclipse 2024-09 (4.33), use https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2024-09 or https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest

entry.title: Re: Interpreting the Executed Visualization plan in SAP HANA
entry.content: You sir are the real mvp

entry.title: Re: Memory Forecast for SAP HANA with SAP EarlyWatch Alert Workspace
entry.content:
Hi Ray, 

if the indexserver memory consumption is already this high, that the system is labeled with "Already reached", it is not possible to get a forecast with this app. However, you can use the EWA dashboard and click on the Memory Area detail page and trigger a "Datafootprint forecast". This will still be possible and gives you a forecast on how the row store and column store will grow over time.

Best regards,

Susanne

entry.title: Re: Performance Optimization of Calculation Views
entry.content: Start at the bottom nodes. Data preview each node and check the performance. Then work up though the levels of the view and see where exactly the performance starts to deteriorate. Then you can copy the SQL statement for the node and look for potential improvements. Good/bad response times are relevant to the design of the view and the amount of data being consumed.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

As a first-generation full-time undergraduate student in Computer Science and a proud scholarship recipient, I am deeply committed to continuous learning and personal growth. I'm writing to express my strong interest in participating in the Digital Skills Initiative. My goal is to deepen my expertise in SAP development and cloud technologies, and I see this program as a perfect fit for my aspirations. It represents an excellent opportunity to stay competitive in the fast-evolving tech landscape and to further my career. I am genuinely excited about this initiative and look forward to the possibility of contributing and growing through this experience.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Guided Sourcing RFP - Item Need quotes
entry.content: Hi Samresh, kindly note that an entry in this Section is mandatory when the event rule - "ENABLE MULTIROUND BIDDING" is selected. You can find this rule in the "Event Settings" > "Set Event rules". in the RFP event navigate to top right corner to see the 3 dots to find the settings. Once you unselect, "Enable multi-round bidding" you would be able to publish the event without any item in this section.

entry.title: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content:
I have created the List Report by using CDS consumption view(ODATA). When I press GO button with STANDARD variant giving errors why because back end has huge data(approx 12 Lakhs) and trying to load all and giving errors.

Requirement: 1. when i press GO button i want to load few data for STANDARD default variant. OR

                       2. Is there a way we can display error messages upon clicking the GO button for fiori apps (List Report) created using managed query (CDS views)

Please let me know any hook methods for GO button validation and how to restrict the data to load only few records and display OR Is there a way we can display error messages upon clicking the GO button pass message like "No items found. Check the search and filter settings." for STANDARD variant  

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Returnable Packaging
entry.content:
Hi Vivek, 

thank you so much for the real good article about the Returnable Packaging Process; it really explains well all steps of the process.

I have one question about this part: "Once the Goods has been received Output type gets triggered which will execute a report program. This Report program will create a Process Order and against this Process Order Goods issues of the components and GR of the Combine Material takes place".

Is this a custom report behind the output triggering? Or is there some standard way to manage this Process Order creation and execution to receive the "Combine Material"?

Thank you in advance!

Best Regards

Alessandro

entry.title: Re: BTP Toolbox: App to Backup & Restore HDI Containers
entry.content:
Hi @AlexPJ 

The codeline on Github works with a single Hana DB instance for DEV, QAS and PRD but the mechanism is the same if you have separate instances. You would just have to adjust the code to support multiple instances. After that, it would also be possible to copy the whole HDI container from PRD to DEV.

This is actually a very good feature request 😅 👍

entry.title: SAP BTP: How to set up alert on database resident memory and database used memory
entry.content:
We need help.
We are currently using SAP BTP and are looking for a way to automatically monitor the memory used in the database (database resident memory, database used memory), and send an alert and email when a certain amount of usage is detected.

Here are the specifications:

  • Using HANA Cloud as the database.
  • Currently, each memory is manually monitored from the Memory Usage section in HANA Cockpit.

Since the memory we want to set alerts for is standard, I thought there might be a default alert function, so I looked in HANA Cockpit under alert > alert definition, but I couldn't find it.

I would like to know if this is something that should be implemented by default in the alert definition, or if it is something that users need to create. If we need to create the alert, please let us know the steps to do so (preferably without using SQL commands, if possible).

entry.title: Re: Net price in PO after exchange but in different currency
entry.content: currency code of vendor is EUR. Would it be that vendor currency is automatically filled to purchase order?

entry.title: Re: Import into node dev_node failed. - Error during clie...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, it is in BTP Cloud Transport Management System.

I have added technical in sapce and destinations for dev , qa and prod  are giving output as 200 OK.

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: GR error Cost element is not assigned to a cost component in CostCompStruct 10 Message no. MLCCS010
entry.content:
Dear esteemed members,

When posting a Goods Reciept, the following error appears. However, the customer can post the same in Quality. They face this issue in Production. Much appreciate for the help and guidance.

Cost element is not assigned to a cost component in CostCompStruct 10

Message no. MLCCS010

Diagnosis

You have activated the actual cost component split.

No cost component has been assigned to cost element origin group in cost component structure 10 for chart of accounts 1000. The system is unable to assign the value to a cost component.

System Response

You cannot carry out posting.

Procedure

Check whether for this operation the value to be posted is to be assigned to this cost element.

If the value has been assigned to the wrong cost element, you should change the account assignment for this operation.

If the value has been assigned to the right cost element, then maintain an assignment of the cost element and origin group in Customizing of Product Cost Planning.

entry.title: Re: PurRqs will be generated when Available Qty -1000 always

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Porto
entry.content:
Dear Porto SAP Community, 

with the SAP CodeJam happening on Friday and the SAP Inside Track on Saturday, we would like to invite you to join us for a casual Meetup on Friday afternoon. This Meetup is a great opportunity to continue the discussion in a more informal setting, while enjoying a meal or a cold beverage with an amazing view. 

Earlier on this day, the CodeJam on Machine Learning using SAP HANA will take place. 

We also would like to invite everyone who will join the SAP Inside Track in Porto on Saturday, to get to know each other beforehand. 

The concrete location will be announced soon, but it will be in the area of Ribeira de Gaia. 

Let us know if you're joining by using the RSVP buttons on the right. 🙂 

Até breve! 

Your SAP Community Advocates
-------

Querida SAP Community no Porto,

com o SAP CodeJam a acontecer na sexta-feira e o SAP Inside Track no sábado, gostaríamos de convidá-vos para um encontro casual na tarde de sexta-feira. Este Meetup é uma ótima oportunidade para continuar as discussões em um ambiente mais informal, enquanto desfrutamos de um jantar o ou uma bebida com uma vista incrível.

No início deste dia, ocorrerá o CodeJam sobre Machine Learning utilizando SAP HANA.

Também gostaríamos de convidar todos que participarão do SAP Inside Track no Porto no sábado a se conhecerem antes do evento.

O local exato será anunciado em breve, mas será na área da Ribeira de Gaia.

Deixe-nos saber se você vai participar utilizando os botões de RSVP à direita. 🙂

Até breve!

Seus Advocates da Comunidade SAP
